calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gary Alabaster, via ZOOM, counsel for Randall Cunliffe, Petitioner.

The court at the outset directs counsel to the differences in how the decedent is named in the title of the real property and in the Spousal Petition before the court and whether a petition for quiet title should have been filed first . Counsel presents oral argument regarding the differences between both petitions. The court advises counsel that there may be issues with the recorder's office and the title company if the petition is granted and an order is issued with how the decedent is named in the order that the court currently has. Counsel then considers submitting an updated [proposed] order. The court proposes that counsel send an updated order to the Examiner via email for quicker review and processing.

The Petition for Spousal Property is submitted with the intent to grant subject to the submission of an updated [proposed] order. The court orders counsel to have the order to the court by noon on Friday, June 4, 2021.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
